page: Microsoft Azure D128s_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the Dsv6 server family. It is powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8573C processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The server features 128 virtual CPUs mapped from 64 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, running at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz. It is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per virtual CPU. This instance does not include local storage or onboard GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable.

In benchmark evaluations, the D128s_v6 demonstrates top-tier performance across several multi-threaded and memory-intensive workloads. Its memory subsystem achieves top-tier read-only bandwidth, reaching 8778.99 GB/sec for small cached blocks and 508.63 GB/sec for large uncached blocks. Multi-core processing capabilities are highlighted by strong stress-ng CPU performance and top-tier Geekbench multi-core scores, including software compilation and ray tracing metrics. Database operations and Redis SET operations also rank in the top tier, executing 157.89 million operations per second. Additionally, the processor's Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) support strong performance in large language model inference tasks.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D128s_v6 offers high resource density and balanced compute-to-memory ratios, making it a viable option for enterprise-scale workloads without the overhead of dedicated GPU hardware. The absence of bundled local storage requires external storage attachment, which allows users to scale storage independently of compute resources. This server is highly suited for multi-threaded applications, software compilation pipelines, high-throughput web serving, database management systems, and CPU-based machine learning inference.
description: Microsoft Azure D128s_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dsv6 family, powered by a dedicated 128-vCPU Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture with 64 physical cores, it features 512.0 GB of RAM, translating to 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance lacks local storage and GPUs but is Premium Storage capable. Benchmark results show top-tier performance in multi-core processing, software compilation, and database operations, alongside exceptional memory bandwidth. The CPU includes Advanced Vector Extensions and Advanced Matrix Extensions, which accelerate cryptography and mathematical computations. This server is optimized for high-throughput web serving, database workloads, multi-threaded applications, and CPU-based machine learning inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D128s_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 128 vCPUs, an Intel Xeon 8573C processor, and 512 GB of RAM, optimized for high-throughput database and multi-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D128s_v6 is a 128-vCPU general-purpose virtual machine with an Intel Xeon processor and 512 GB RAM, built for enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-core general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processing and balanced memory allocation for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 128 vCPUs and 64 physical cores
512.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core
Top-tier memory bandwidth and multi-core processing benchmark results
Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for accelerated mathematical operations
Well-suited for database management, software compilation, and web serving
